title: Sources
description: A subscription the user follows — an RSS feed or a saved web-search query — that the newsroom polls for news.

value.description: the RSS feed URL or the search query text; dedupe key

topics.description: array of topic tag strings this source is filed under

active.description: whether the newsroom currently polls it

lastFetchedAt.description: when the newsroom last polled this source

items.description: raw entries fetched from this source

health.description: the per-source health-metrics row (one per source)
